overall.description: First-person perspective walking along the gravel shoulder of a desert highway at dusk in GTA V. The scene features moderate traffic flow with cars and trucks passing by in both directions, flanked by rocky mountain terrain and power lines under a purple twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with mountain backdrop

events.description: large semi-truck with trailer passes closely on the left, temporarily dominating the view
motorcycle with headlight on passes quickly in the left lane

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder, maintaining safe distance from the highway traffic

notable_agents.action: semi-truck with illuminated trailer moving at highway speed in the right lane
oncoming car with bright headlights approaching in the left lane

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation forming the left boundary of the highway corridor
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation immediately adjacent to the shoulder
multi-lane asphalt highway with white lane markings and active traffic
tall metal electrical transmission towers visible in the distance against the sky
metal guardrail separating the shoulder from the traffic lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway at dusk, with the camera walking along the gravel shoulder. Rocky mountains rise on the left while a steep cliff dominates the right. Moderate traffic flows in both directions, with a large semi-truck passing closely at 8 seconds. Power lines are visible far in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with approaching power infrastructure

events.description: left side terrain becomes more rugged with visible rocky outcrops and less vegetation
white box truck with company logo passes by in the right lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace along the shoulder as the power lines grow larger in the distance

notable_agents.action: white commercial box truck traveling in the right lane with taillights visible

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the highway shoulder with the power transmission towers gradually approaching from the distance. The terrain on the left becomes more rocky and rugged. Traffic remains moderate with various vehicles including a white box truck passing by. The purple twilight sky remains clear with visible stars.

events.description: yellow diamond-shaped road sign becomes visible on the left side of the highway
camera passes the road sign which temporarily blocks the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking past the road sign while continuing along the shoulder, approaching the curve in the highway

notable_agents.action: black sedan with brake lights illuminated, slowing down in the right lane

entered.detail: diamond-shaped yellow warning sign on metal pole indicating a curve ahead

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a yellow warning sign appears on the left indicating a curve in the road ahead. The camera walks past the sign at close range, temporarily occluding the view. The power lines are now much closer and more prominent against the darkening sky. Traffic continues to flow as the highway curves gently through the mountainous terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a desert highway shoulder that transitions from an open stretch of road toward a curving mountain pass under a deepening twilight sky. It begins between rocky mountains and a steep cliff, moving past a flow of moderate traffic as a large semi-truck passes closely. As the camera advances, the distant power transmission towers gradually loom larger and the terrain to the left becomes increasingly rugged, while a white box truck glides by under a clear purple sky dotted with stars. The scene then shifts as a yellow curve warning sign appears on the left, momentarily occluding the view as the camera passes it at close range. Finally, the highway begins to curve gently through the mountains, with the power lines now prominent against the darkening horizon.
